web.title: 42 Pine: Home
web.description: Located in one of Miami Beach's most desirable residential neighborhoods, 42 Pine offers a limited collection of fifty well-appointed residences.

## Located in one of Miami Beach’s most desirable residential neighborhoods,    42 Pine offers a limited collection of fifty well-appointed residences    with exceptional services and amenities.

[Neighborhood](https://42pine.com/neighborhood/)[Floor Plans](https://42pine.com/floorplans/)[Inquire](https://42pine.com/inquire/)[Residences](https://42pine.com/residences/)[Amenities](https://42pine.com/amenities/)[Neighborhood](https://42pine.com/neighborhood/)[Floor Plans](https://42pine.com/floorplans/)[Inquire](https://42pine.com/inquire/)[Residences](https://42pine.com/residences/)[Amenities](https://42pine.com/amenities/)[Neighborhood](https://42pine.com/neighborhood/)

![](https://42pine.com/wp-content/themes/fortytwopine/images/slider-arrow.svg)

![](https://42pine.com/wp-content/themes/fortytwopine/images/slider-arrow.svg)

## Be among the few who will call this exclusive, boutique    Miami Beach condominium home and discover a    lifestyle of comfort, luxury and convenience.

![](https://42pine.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/04/residences-box.jpg)

Designed by Arquitectonica, an award-winning, internationally-recognized architectural firm, 42 Pine’s one-to-three-bedroom homes are delivered move-in ready, featuring gracious floorplans, modern interiors and elegant finishes throughout.

[The Residences](https://42pine.com/residences/)

![](https://42pine.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/04/rooftop-pool-box-scaled.jpg)

Experience a lifestyle of modern luxury and convenience with first-class amenities and services designed to provide a balance of privacy, comfort and ease for the entire family.

[Amenities & Services](https://42pine.com/amenities/)

![](https://42pine.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/04/neighborhood-box.jpg)

Located a few short blocks from the Atlantic Ocean, 42 Pine is centrally located in one of Miami Beach’s most coveted and walkable residential neighborhoods.

[The Neighborhood](https://42pine.com/neighborhood/)

- Description

This cookie is set by the Google recaptcha service to identify bots to protect the website against malicious spam attacks.

session

- Description

This cookie is set by the Google recaptcha service to identify bots to protect the website against malicious spam attacks.


- Cookie

- Duration

session

- Description

This cookie is set by web application built in ASP.NET MVC Technologies. This is an anti-forgery cookie used for preventing cross site request forgery attacks.


- Cookie

- Duration

6 months

- Description

YouTube sets this cookie to store the user's cookie consent state for the current domain.


- Cookie

7 days

- Description

Amazon Web Services set this cookie for load balancing.


- Cookie

\_cfuvid

session

- Description

Cloudflare sets this cookie to track users across sessions to optimize user experience by maintaining session consistency and providing personalized services


- Cookie

1 year 1 month 4 days

- Description

This cookie is set by Dropbox and is used for the 'save to Dropbox' functionality. This cookie stores user session IDs.

- Description

- Description

- Cookie

- Duration

session

- Description

This cookie is set by Windows Azure cloud, and is used for load balancing to make sure the visitor page requests are routed to the same server in any browsing session.


- Cookie

ARRAffinity

- Duration

session

- Description

ARRAffinity cookie is set by Azure app service, and allows the service to choose the right instance established by a user to deliver subsequent requests made by that user.


- Cookie

XSRF-TOKEN

- Duration

1 year

- Description

This cookie enhances visitor browsing security by preventing cross-site request forgery.


- Cookie

m

- Duration

1 year 1 month 4 days

- Description

Stripe sets this cookie for fraud prevention purposes. It identifies the device used to access the website, allowing the website to be formatted accordingly.


Functional

Functional cookies help perform certain functionalities like sharing the content of the website on social media platforms, collecting feedback, and other third-party features.

- Cookie

VISITOR\_INFO1\_LIVE

- Duration

6 months

- Description

A cookie set by YouTube to measure bandwidth that determines whether the user gets the new or old player interface.


- Cookie

ytidb::LAST\_RESULT\_ENTRY\_KEY

- Duration

Never Expires

- Description

The cookie ytidb::LAST\_RESULT\_ENTRY\_KEY is used by YouTube to store the last search result entry that was clicked by the user. This information is used to improve the user experience by providing more relevant search results in the future.


- Cookie

yt-remote-connected-devices

- Duration

Never Expires

- Description

YouTube sets this cookie to store the user's video preferences using embedded YouTube videos.


- Cookie

- Cookie

session

session

session

- Duration

session

- Description

The yt-remote-cast-available cookie is used to store the user's preferences regarding whether casting is available on their YouTube video player.


- Cookie

session

- Description

Analytics

Analytical cookies are used to understand how visitors interact with the website. These cookies help provide information on metrics such as the number of visitors, bounce rate, traffic source, etc.

1 year 1 month 4 days

- Cookie

1 year 1 month 4 days

- Description

Google Analytics sets this cookie to calculate visitor, session and campaign data and track site usage for the site's analytics report. The cookie stores information anonymously and assigns a randomly generated number to recognise unique visitors.

1 year

- Description

- Description

session

session

- Description

The ANONCHK cookie, set by Bing, is used to store a user's session ID and verify ads' clicks on the Bing search engine. The cookie helps in reporting and personalization as well.


- Cookie

Never Expires

- Description

6 months

## About

## 42 Pine

_42 Pine: Boutique, hill town-inspired plush community with Kosher-friendly kitchens and Shabbat elevators in the serene Mid-beach_

Developed by New York’s affluent Boylmelgreen family (under JP Roosevelt LLC), 42 Pine seeks to bring timeless sophistication and exemplary luxury to Mid-Beach’s exclusive Pine Tree Drive neighborhood. Envisioned to offer modern luxury to residents, the boutique condo project will feature Kosher-friendly kitchens and Shabbat-enabled elevators – affording a one-of-a-kind lifestyle in Miami beach.

Designed by the award-winning Arquitectonica, 42 Pine will rise as an 8-story condo community with 50 move-in-ready residences. Featuring a distinct hill town-inspired structure, the mid-rise will offer a play on contrasting materials to highlight its cubic village idea. Built to maximize space and bring in natural light, each luxury residence will feature private terraces with glass railings, French white oak hardwood flooring, marble countertops, custom Italian cabinetry, spa-inspired bathrooms, premium fittings, and other refined finishes. Highlight amenities will include a 52-foot elevated rooftop pool with cabanas, a rooftop lounge terrace, private rooftop yoga and meditation lawn, an outdoor terrace, a contemporary media lounge with table tennis & billiards, a children’s game room, spa room, high-speed Shabbat elevators, and more.

Living at 42 Pine, residents will be within walking distance from top-grade schools, Walgreens, the Mt. Sinai Medical Center, world-class hotels, and the beach. By car, residents will be 5 minutes from Miami Beach Golf Club, 5 minutes from the Bass Museum, less than 10 minutes from La Gorce Country Club, less than 10 minutes from the Faena District with its eclectic bazaar and performance theater, and 10 minutes from shopping at the Lincoln Road Mall.

42 Pine Residence Features:

- 1- to 3-bedroom residences + 8 penthouses

KITCHENS

- Custom Italian wood finish soft-touch cabinetry
- Kohler pull-down sink faucet fittings
- Expansive kitchen islands with room for seating in select residences\*
- Volakas Marble kitchen countertops and full backsplashes
- Kohler bar sink faucet fittings in select residences\*
- Designed to meet Kosher kitchen standards

BATHROOMS

- Custom Italian wood finish vanity cabinetry with double-sinks and Volakas polished marble countertops
- Kohler glass-enclosed rainfall shower system with handheld shower wand and wall-mounted showerhead in select residences\*
- Honed Irish Cream marble tile flooring and walls
- Wall-mounted LED sconces with framed mirrors
- Kohler freestanding soaking bathtub
- 4” downlight LED dimmable, recessed overhead lighting

42 Pine Building Amenities:

- Resort-inspired, rooftop amenity deck
- 52’ elevated rooftop pool with cabanas and chaise lounges
- Rooftop lounge terrace
- Heated whirlpool rooftop spa
- Private rooftop yoga and meditation lawn
- Outdoor terrace with two, separate summer kitchens
- Elegant club room
- Contemporary media lounge with table tennis and billiards
- Children’s game room
- State-of-the-art fitness center
- Spa room for private appointments
- Daily porter service
- Bicycle Storage
- Stroller Storage
- Concierge Service
- High-speed elevators with Shabbat mode
- 24-Hour Valet and doorman
